editors_pick.title: A Lebanese Worship Song Called for Peace. Again. And Again.
editors_pick.summary: On a May evening, Claudette El Hajj organized five buses to bring 150 people displaced by the war in Lebanon to a worship night in a hilltop town overlooking Beirut. Many were Christians who had been forced to flee their homes in southern Lebanon due to heavy fighting between Hezbollah and Israel...
